name: Apollo.io
description: Apollo.io is a sales intelligence and engagement platform with a database of 275M+ contacts and 73M companies. Sales teams use it to find prospects, enrich CRM data, and run outbound sequences — all in one tool.
cons: Can hit email deliverability issues if overused
UI has many features to navigate
use_cases: You need to prospect and run outbound email sequences from a single tool without stitching multiple products together
Your SDR team wants to find verified contacts by company size, industry, or job title from a 275M+ contact database
You're replacing ZoomInfo and want similar data quality at a fraction of the cost
Your sales team uses a built-in dialer and needs call recordings synced automatically to your CRM
